title: NeoBackSlot
description: A lightweight Back Slot and Belt Slot equipment mod for NeoForge 1.21.1.
body:
# NeoBackSlot

NeoBackSlot is a lightweight Back Slot and Belt Slot equipment mod for NeoForge 1.21.1.

Store weapons and tools on your character's back or belt for quick access using configurable keybinds (by default **G** for the Back Slot and **V** for the Belt Slot). Items are fully synchronized in multiplayer and visible to other players.

NeoBackSlot is designed with **compatibility in mind**, supporting not only vanilla equipment but also many **modded weapons and tools**, making it a great fit for heavily modded RPG-style modpacks.

📷 Additional screenshots and previews can be found in the **Gallery** section.

---

## Features

* Back Slot
* Belt Slot
* Quick weapon swapping
* Multiplayer synchronization
* Dedicated server support
* HUD indicators
* Inventory GUI integration
* Custom sounds
* Death drop support
* Basic grave mod compatibility
* Lightweight and dependency-free
* Compatible with many modded weapons and tools

![Items equipped in Back Slots and Belt Slots are fully visible and synchronized between players.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3beceb9b18b017d3d1cb6ee1c753e48dbabba7e.png)

---

## Controls

| Action         | Default Key |
| -------------- | ----------- |
| Swap Back Slot | G           |
| Swap Belt Slot | V           |

All keybinds can be changed through Minecraft's Controls menu.

---

## Configuration

A configuration file will be generated automatically:

```txt
config/neobackslot-common.toml
```

Available option:

```toml
[death]
keepItemsOnDeath = false
```

When enabled, Back Slot and Belt Slot items will remain equipped after respawn.

---

## Installation

1. Install NeoForge for Minecraft 1.21.1.
2. Place NeoBackSlot into the `mods` folder.
3. For multiplayer, installing it on both the client and server is recommended.
4. Launch the game.

No additional dependencies are required.

---

## Credits

NeoBackSlot is heavily inspired by the original **BackSlot** mod created by **Globox1997**.

This is **not** a direct port of BackSlot. NeoBackSlot is an independent NeoForge implementation developed specifically for Minecraft 1.21.1.

---

## Compatibility

NeoBackSlot has been successfully tested with:

* Singleplayer
* Dedicated servers
* Multiplayer environments
* Large modpacks (300+ mods)
* YIGD (You're In Grave Danger)

The mod is designed to work alongside most NeoForge modpacks without requiring additional libraries.

---

## Known Issues

* Tridents may appear visually misaligned when equipped in the Belt Slot.
* Some modded shields may require additional transform or scaling adjustments.
* Grave mods restore Back Slot and Belt Slot items as regular inventory items.
* If a grave is claimed while the player's inventory is completely full, Back Slot and Belt Slot items may not be restored correctly.

---

## Bug Reports & Feature Requests

Found a bug or compatibility issue?

Please report it on GitHub Issues:

https://github.com/whitevoid7/NeoBackSlot/issues
